## Copyright

First published in 2026 by the University of Edinburgh

<https://books.ed.ac.uk/edinburgh-diamond> | [\@EdinDiamond](https://bsky.app/profile/edinburghdiamond.bsky.social)

Collection © Editors, 2026  
Text © Authors, 2026  
Images © Contributors and copyright holders named in Images Section at the end of the book, 2026  

The authors have asserted their rights under the Copyright, Designs and Patents Act 1988 to be identified as the authors of this work. 

This book is published under Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0), <https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/>

![](chapters/images/C00_CC_logo.png){fig-alt="Logo of CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 license" fig-align="left" width="30%"}

Further details about Creative Commons licenses are available at <https://creativecommons.org/about/cclicenses/>


_Attribution should include the following information:_  
Blankinship, Orzechowski, Desvages, Banas, Noè, Oldnall, Sharifi Far, Llewellyn, Alex, Evkaya, and McManus. 2026. Teaching Programming Across Disciplines.  
Edinburgh: University of Edinburgh. <https://doi.org/10.2218/ED.9781836450795>

Any third-party material in this book is not covered by the book’s Creative Commons license. Details of the copyright ownership and permitted use of third-party material is given in the image credit lines. If you would like to reuse any third-party material not covered by the book’s Creative Commons license, you will need to obtain permission directly from the copyright owner. 

ISBN (print): 978-1-83645-168-6  
ISBN (ebook): 978-1-83645-079-5  
DOI: 10.2218/ED.9781836450795  
DOI link: <https://doi.org/10.2218/ED.9781836450795>

Cover design by Pawel Orzechowski

Printed and bound by Lulu.com

This project was supported by a grant from the University of Edinburgh's Principal's Teaching Award Scheme (PTAS), which funded a project coordinator role. No authors or contributors were paid for their contribution to this book.


![](chapters/images/C00_UoE_logo.png){fig-alt="The University of Edinburgh logo" fig-alight=left width=40%}
![](chapters/images/C00_EdinburghDiamond_logo.png){fig-alt="Edinburgh Diamond logo" fig-alight=left width=40%}

---
